title: Excellent Performance of Nvidium + Voxy
description: Excellent Performance of Nvidium + Voxy - world optimization using Nvidium + Voxy + other optimization mods
body:
Excellent Performance of Nvidium + Voxy: Push NVIDIA Hardware to the Limit
This is not a modpack for everyone. This is a specialized, uncompromising toolkit built exclusively for NVIDIA GPU users who have one ultimate goal: to achieve the maximum possible view distance and rendering performance in Minecraft, breaking through traditional engine limitations.

The Core Philosophy: Raw Rendering Power

The pack is engineered around two groundbreaking, GPU-specific mods that work in tandem:

Nvidium: A revolutionary renderer that bypasses standard OpenGL, using NVIDIA-specific Vulkan extensions to unlock unprecedented throughput and draw distance.

Voxy: An intelligent octree-based rendering engine that complements Nvidium by optimizing how and when chunks are sent to your GPU, eliminating waste and maximizing efficiency.

Together, they form an unstoppable duo. You are not just tweaking settings; you are fundamentally changing how the game uses your GeForce RTX or GTX card. The result is a view distance measured in thousands of blocks, with performance that keeps the game perfectly playable where vanilla Minecraft would have collapsed into single-digit FPS.

What You Get (And What You Don't)

✅ THE ULTIMATE RENDER DISTANCE: Experience a world that loads farther and faster than you ever thought possible. See mountain ranges, builds, and terrain from immense distances.
✅ PEAK NVIDIA PERFORMANCE: Leverage your GPU's architecture directly for minimal driver overhead and maximum frame throughput.
✅ ROCK-SOLID FOUNDATION: Enhanced by a select group of complementary server/client optimization mods (like Lithium, Starlight) to ensure no other bottlenecks hold back your GPU.

❌ NO SHADER SUPPORT: This pack is built for pure performance and distance, not visual effects. The techniques used by Nvidium and Voxy are fundamentally incompatible with traditional OpenGL shader packs like those via Iris. If your priority is cinematic visuals, this is not the pack for you.

Who Is This For?

This modpack is designed for:

Explorers & Cartographers who want to see the true scale of their world.

Technical Players & Server Admins needing extreme render distance for farms and mega-builds.

NVIDIA Purists who want to extract every last ounce of performance from their hardware for a specific, demanding task.

Excellent Performance of Nvidium + Voxy is the scalpel, not the Swiss Army knife. It delivers on one promise with brutal efficiency: giving you the farthest, fastest rendering view Minecraft can achieve on an NVIDIA GPU. Accept no compromises on your journey to the horizon.
